style: AAA / cinematic game foley — the quality bar is top-tier console/film sound design (think Zelda, God of War, Lord of the Rings), NOT retro chiptune. Realistic, layered, punchy, production-clean one-shots.

sounds.name: Coin Pickup
sounds.description: a bright, short metallic jingle played when the player picks up a gold coin
sounds.usage: Play on gold_coin / gold_ingot pickup and shop sales.

sounds.name: Gem Pickup
sounds.description: a sparkly ascending chime for collecting a gem or valuable
sounds.usage: Play on gem_ruby and other high-value pickups.

sounds.name: Item Get
sounds.description: a cheerful little fanfare for receiving a new item into the inventory
sounds.usage: Play when a tool or item enters the inventory.

sounds.name: Menu Select
sounds.description: a soft neutral blip when moving the cursor between menu options
sounds.usage: Cursor movement in menus and dialogs.
